aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Red's Mechanical due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. The site lacks the depth and structured data needed for AI to confidently recommend them.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured FAQPage schema.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with essential business details.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized or even visible, severely limiting local search visibility and AI trust signals.
critical_issues: GBP not found, making the business invisible to Google AI.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to build engagement and authority.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect, ensuring reliable business information across the web.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for broader coverage.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'Mesa HVAC services' and 'trusted HVAC companies in Gilbert, AZ'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with the necessary information for citations.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and industry expertise to position as the go-to HVAC authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Red's Mechanical misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The absence of FAQ content and LocalBusiness schema means AI models like ChatGPT and Google AI overlook the business in relevant queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will integrate structured data, create conversational content, and optimize your GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share. Immediate action is crucial to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Gilbert, AZ
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found that while your NAP consistency is strong, AI assistants currently overlook your expertise due to missing structured data and conversational content.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Red’s Mechanical | Commercial & Residential HVAC Services
